things.name: Fiat Tagliero Building
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage 1938 cantilevered modernist fuel station - a marvel of Italian Futurism

things.name: Italian Modernist Architecture Walk
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage city with the world's finest collection of 1930s Italian architecture

things.name: Asmara Cathedral
things.description: 1922 Lombard Romanesque Catholic cathedral built by Italian Capuchin missionaries

things.name: Cinema Impero
things.description: 1937 Art Deco cinema still showing films - a perfectly preserved capsule of the 1930s

things.name: Asmara Market
things.description: Lively traditional Eritrean market with spices, injera bread and traditional crafts

things.name: Enda Mariam Orthodox Cathedral
things.description: Eritrean Orthodox cathedral built in 1921 - heart of the Eritrean church

things.name: Tank Graveyard
things.description: Open-air museum of tanks and military vehicles from the independence war

things.name: Massawa Red Sea Port Day Trip
things.description: Ancient coral stone town and Red Sea beaches 2 hours by train or car

things.name: Filfil Solomuna Jungle
things.description: Montane juniper forest with green monkeys and endemic birds

things.name: Zigni (Lamb & Chilli Stew)
things.description: Eritrea's signature dish - lamb stewed with the pungent berbere chilli paste on injera
